overall.description: Third-person game footage showing a character walking along a cobblestone forest path on an overcast autumn day. The character encounters a black bear on the trail before continuing toward rocky mountain terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with cobblestone path through grassy hills

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding cobblestone path through the forested hills

entered.detail: irregular stone paving forming the walking trail
tall deciduous trees with green foliage lining the path
trees with vibrant red and orange autumn leaves
grass-covered slopes on both sides of the trail
hazy forested mountains visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding cobblestone path through an open forest area. Tall green trees and scattered red autumn trees line the grassy hillsides under an overcast sky, with distant mountains visible through the haze.

events.description: black bear appears standing in the middle of the path ahead
character passes the bear which moves to the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a black bear standing on the trail

notable_agents.action: black bear standing in the path then moving to the side as the character approaches

entered.detail: large mossy boulder beside the path

segments.scene_description: A black bear suddenly appears standing in the middle of the cobblestone path. The character continues walking forward, passing close to the bear as it moves to the side, revealing more rocky terrain ahead.

events.description: trail becomes more enclosed by rocky outcrops and dense red autumn trees

agents.ego_description: walking uphill toward the rocky mountain terrain ahead

entered.detail: steep grey rock face with sparse vegetation becoming prominent ahead
dark opening in the rock formation at the end of the visible path

segments.scene_description: After passing the bear, the character continues ascending the cobblestone trail toward a rocky mountain face. The path becomes more enclosed by grassy hills and vibrant red autumn trees, leading toward a dark cave entrance visible in the cliff ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding forest trail that transitions from an open woodland into a rugged mountain ascent. It begins with the character walking along a cobblestone path through a landscape of green and red autumn trees under a hazy, overcast sky. As the character advances, a black bear suddenly appears in the middle of the trail, momentarily blocking the way before stepping aside to reveal the rocky terrain ahead. The scene then shifts as the path climbs higher, becoming more enclosed by vibrant red foliage and grassy hillsides. Finally, the camera follows the ascent toward a steep mountain face, leading directly toward a dark cave entrance embedded in the cliff.
